use_cases: Display server status and health metrics in an infrastructure dashboard
Manage multiple virtual or dedicated servers from a centralized interface
Monitor CPU usage and operational status across a server fleet
Control server states (active/paused/inactive) with quick action buttons
Track server locations, IP addresses, and renewal due dates
ai_summary: A server management table component for displaying infrastructure data including server names, OS types (Windows/Linux/Ubuntu), geographic locations, IP addresses, CPU utilization metrics, and status indicators. Features interactive action buttons for controlling server states with smooth framer-motion animations and next-themes integration for dark/light mode support. Designed for DevOps dashboards and SaaS hosting control panels.
